package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_gomaxprocs_set_in_library: Layer: Build and runtime configuration. Flag libraries setting GOMAXPROCS and overriding host runtime policy.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario586Positive(items []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		_ = time.Now()
		_ = time.After(time.Millisecond)
		total += len(item)
	}
	return total
}
